title: Create Colonies - Remixed
description: A Remix of the Create Colonies- A Perfect World 2 Extension from CharlieDelta on Cursed Forge
body:
This pack is a remix of CharlieDelta modpack [_Create Colonies- A Perfect World 2 Extension_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-colonies-a-perfect-world-2-extension) that itself is an extension of MrBeardstones [_Create: Perfect World 2_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-perfect-world-2) mod pack.

I removed and added some Mods so it's more fun to play for me and my friends.
It features a complete overhaul of the world generation and some new QOL mods, it also includes new mobs and mounts.

This pack is a bit resource intensive, so I suggest a minimum 8GB of RAM for minecraft.
I added a few optimization mods here and there but hey I'm not a magicen :D

I hope you enjoy this modpack!

---

I didn't figure out how to upload a dedicated server pack here, so follow these instructions if you want to play on a dedicated server:

Remove Mods:
- DistantHorizons
- OculusCompat
- Sounds
- YungsMenuTweaks
- embeddium
- embeddiumplus
- entity_model_features_forge
- entity_texture_features_forge
- freecam
- oculus-flywheel-compat
- oculus

---

Some modes are not available here on Modrinth, so I had to collect them from Cursedforged:
- [Create Recycle Everything (create_recycle_1.0.2_forge_1.20.1.jar)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything) 
- [Aquaculture 2 (Aquaculture-1.20.1-2.5.2.jar)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
